---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for luka
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What limitation or workflow gap should this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the smallest useful behavior change.

## Scope

List the modules likely involved, such as Agent Loop, tools, Harness, context, planning, observability, or evals.

## Non-Goals

Call out anything that should stay out of scope. This project is intentionally not a full IDE agent, plugin marketplace, complete OS sandbox, or RAG system.

## Validation

How should the change be tested or evaluated?
